content: The CJI expressed displeasure that almost everyday, the matters related to SIR in West Bengal were being mentioned before it

title: Waiting for another take-off: Dealing with U.P.’s stalled airports
content: Over the past few years, several airports have been inaugurated across second- and third-tier cities of Uttar Pradesh to boost regional connectivity. However, operations at a number of these have been discontinued within weeks of launch, prompting questions over planning, viability and the gap between infrastructure expansion and sustained services

content: The BJP promises an aid of ₹3,000 to unemployed youths — double of Trinamool’s offer — as women’s safety takes centrestage in poll manifestos of major parties

title: 21 held for 'involvement' in violence during protest march in Manipur

content: A bench comprising Chief Justice Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi rebuked the petitioner, Pinakpani Mohanty, for wasting the court's time.

title: TNCC chief Selvaperunthagai alleges ‘unlawful confinement’ amid I-T raids at residence

content: Taking exception to Mr. Palaniswami’s remarks that he could not walk on the streets of Gobichettipalayam, Mr. Sengottaiyan said the party leader “comes from Salem and yet challenges me here.”

content: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu received birthday greetings on Monday from Prime Minister Narendra Modi, five State counterparts, political rivals and Telugu film stars.

content: According to data from the India Meteorological Department (IMD), four districts in north interior Karnataka and one district in south interior Karnataka saw the mercury rising above the 40°C mark.

content: The South Korean President began his three-day state visit to India on Sunday (April 19, 2026) to bolster bilateral ties in trade, defence and critical technologies

content: Ground visits by The Hindu across Delhi revealed that despite laws meant to regulate the sale of corrosive substances, acid remains easily accessible without ID proof or any inquiry into the purpose of purchase.

content: Indira Parthasarathy’s novel explores student activism’s decline in post-Independence Tamil Nadu through Kesavan’s journey

title: AIADMK looks to defend Melur and Usilampatti, its southern strongholds
content: Intra-party conflicts, which eroded the party’s core base in the southern districts, do not have much impact on these two constituencies in Madurai; while the AIADMK has won from the Melur Assembly segment five times consecutively since 2001, Usilampatti has rarely elected a DMK candidate

content: Besides the Gandhis, the High Court had also issued notices to Suman Dubey, Sam Pitroda, Young Indian, Dotex Merchandise Pvt. Ltd. and Sunil Bhandari on the ED’s plea

content: Superintendent of Police Laxman Nimbargi has said that the indefinite strike to demand filling vacancies in government departments can jeopardise life in Vijayapura

content: In a state dominated by big-budget Hindi films and Bollywood stars, Marathi cinema is carving out space with fresher, more rooted stories — increasingly finding younger audiences on OTT platforms. Here’s a guide to discovering them

content: Police say both had consumed liquor. FIR states the victim had prepared chicken curry at home which was not shared with the accused, triggering the altercation

content: The National Medical Commission in its proposed amendments to the “Registration of Medical Practitioners and Licence to Practice Medicine (Amendment), Regulations 2026” has also mooted the idea of introducing a single-State licence for Armed Forces Medical Services (AFMS) doctors to practice across the country

title: Woman complains that in-laws killed her daughter in Belagavi district
content: The deceased had come back to her maternal home, and complained of cruel treatment by her husband and in-laws.

content: Dr. Pardeshi, in his address, spoke about his work in student verification, campaigns against illegal construction, projects during the COVID-19 period, and training of administrative staff

content: Roman Reigns is champion once again, but what should fans expect in the latest title reign of the OTC?

title: Wemby tops Duncan with 35 in Spurs playoff debut
content: Victor Wembanyama scored 35 points, the most by a Spurs player making his postseason debut, while leading a 111-98 win over the Trail Blazers in Game 1 of their first-round series Sunday night.

title: Sabres surge in 3rd for 1st playoff win in 15 years
content: Buffalo overcame a two-goal deficit in the final eight minutes to beat the Bruins 4-3 on Sunday night in the Sabres' first playoff game in 15 years.

title: OK State lands top transfer Crooks from ISU
content: Former Iowa State center Audi Crooks, No. 1 in ESPN's women's basketball transfer rankings, committed to Oklahoma State, she announced Sunday night.

title: 'We belong here': Magic stun Pistons in Game 1
content: The Magic showed an intensity and fight that had been missing for most of the season as they stunned No. 1 seed Detroit in Game 1 of their series.

title: Cooper: Penalty 'stupidity' cost Lightning in G1
content: Lightning coach Jon Cooper was not happy with the penalties his team committed in its Game 1 overtime loss to the Canadiens on Sunday.

title: Bengals extend Lawrence after blockbuster trade
content: Defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence II passed his physical with the Bengals and signed a one-year, $28 million extension, the Win Sports Group told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Indiana DC claps back at Simpson, Alabama fans
content: Indiana defensive coordinator Bryant Haines heard the comments from former Alabama quarterback Ty Simpson about the teams' matchup last season in the Rose Bowl and responded with his own observations.

title: 'Gonna get loud': Mets head home as skid hits 11
content: Nico Hoerner hit a sacrifice fly off Craig Kimbrel in the 10th inning as the Cubs extended the Mets' losing streak to 11 games by rallying for a 2-1 victory.

content: Mel Kiper Jr.'s annual list of NFL draft favorites includes two speedy receivers, three undersized cornerbacks and some gritty linemen.

content: Lawrence informed the Giants he wanted a new deal or trade, the Giants didn't want to let him go -- until the price was right.

content: Audi Crooks is headed to Oklahoma St., Jordan Lee is bound for South Carolina and Kymora Johnson is staying at U.Va.

content: Hannah Green won the JM Eagle LA Championship on Sunday for the third time in our years and the first at El Caballero.

content: Manchester City's 2-1 win over Arsenal becomes a huge confidence boost for Pep Guardiola's side in the Premier League title race.

title: Van Dijk hands Liverpool a UCL boost and reason to believe after more late drama
content: Liverpool won with a late goal to go seven points clear of Chelsea in the race for the Champions League.

title: Tyler Reddick rolls in OT, wins fifth Cup Series race
content: Tyler Reddick became just the fourth driver to win five of the first nine NASCAR Cup Series races in a season, and the first since Dale Earnhardt nearly four decades ago, when he passed Kyle Larson on the final lap of overtime at Kansas Speedway Sunday.

content: With eight picks in the first and second rounds, New York sits where the former Cowboys coach was 35 years ago.

content: How Dianna Russini and New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel scrambled to respond to photos published in the New York Post.

title: Jon Rahm wins in Mexico, capping wild week for LIV
content: Jon Rahm capped off a chaotic week on LIV Golf when he closed with a 7-under 64 on Sunday for a six-shot victory in LIV Golf Mexico City.

title: 10 NFL draft prospects to put on your fantasy radar -- and three others to monitor
content: With the NFL draft nearly upon us, it's time to think about how the top prospects will fare in fantasy.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Barcelona step up interest in Italy right back
content: Barcelona are stepping up their pursuit of Atalanta right back Marco Palestra, while Arsenal remain interested in Julián Álvarez.

title: Trump kept out of war room, 'screamed at aides': What happened after US jet was shot down in Iran
content: A US jet downed over Iran caused turmoil in the White House. President Donald Trump pushed for immediate rescue of two missing airmen. Officials planned a complex mission to retrieve them from Iranian territory. One airman was quickly recovered. The second was rescued after over 24 hours behind enemy lines. This averted a major setback for the administration.

title: 'Black magic' in IPL? Lalit Modi reveals 'one owner did this' in 2011
content: A viral video of a Sunrisers Hyderabad fan performing a lemon ritual during an IPL match coincided with Shivam Dube's dismissal, sparking 'black magic' accusations. An unverified letter claiming CSK complained to the IPL has also circulated. Former IPL commissioner Lalit Modi alleged similar past incidents involving team owners.

title: If you hope to become a lawful resident or US citizen, follow the law: USCIS chief
content: USCIS Director Joseph Edlow has declared a 'full-scale war' on immigration fraud, warning that past Green Card approvals are being re-examined for any signs of deception.  The agency is committed to rigorous vetting, emphasizing that compliance with immigration laws is paramount for those seeking residency or citizenship.  New tip lines are active to report suspected fraud.

title: Boost for energy sector: PM Modi to inaugurate Rs 79,450 crore petrochemical refinery — top things to know
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will inaugurate a significant refinery-cum-petrochemical complex in Rajasthan's Pachpadra. Developed by HPCL and the state government, this Rs 79,450 crore facility boasts a 9 MMTPA refining capacity and 2.4 MMTPA petrochemical output. Expected to commence commercial operations in July 2026, it aims to bolster India's energy security and reduce import reliance.

title: Watch: Russia’s Tuapse refinery on fire after Ukraine strikes; two ships struck in Crimea
content: Ukraine has intensified its attacks on Russian, targeting its military and energy targets. Overnight drone strikes targeted two Russian landing ships in Sevastopol Bay of Crimea. The Tuapse oil refinery was also hit for the second time in a week. Russian officials confirmed damage to transport infrastructure at Tuapse port. One person was killed and another injured in the latest strike.

title: ‘We take notes ...’: Cooper Connolly reveals secret behind Punjab Kings’ dream run
content: Punjab Kings maintain their unbeaten IPL 2026 streak, driven by a strong dressing-room culture and a focus on collective improvement. All-rounder Cooper Connolly highlighted the team's collaborative approach and captain Shreyas Iyer's leadership in fostering a positive environment. Their dominant performances, including a significant partnership, underscore their status as a formidable contender.

title: Anthropic CEO 'knows absolutely nothing' about AI effects on jobs, says godfather of AI
content: AI expert Yann LeCun disagrees with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei's forecast of AI eliminating many entry-level jobs. LeCun suggests economists are better equipped to analyze technological impacts on employment. Amodei previously warned AI could replace a significant portion of white-collar roles within five years, calling AI a general labor substitute.

title: Fly91 flight to Hubballi diverted to Bengaluru amid bad weather; passengers seen in distress
content: A Fly91 flight from Hyderabad to Hubballi was diverted to Bengaluru on Sunday due to adverse weather, causing anxiety among its 22 passengers. The aircraft circled Hubballi for an hour before heading to Bengaluru, eventually returning to Hubballi later that night after conditions improved. Such diversions are standard safety procedures.

title: 'Bhooth Bangla' BO collection day 3: Akshay Kumar's film misses Rs 100cr mark
content: Akshay Kumar's 'Bhooth Bangla' is a box office hit, surpassing 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' and earning Rs 58 crore net in India by Sunday. Despite mixed critical reviews, the horror-comedy's humor and unique plot have resonated with audiences. The film, directed by Priyadarshan, also marks a reunion after 16 years and is the late Asrani's final film. Read on to know more in detail.

title: As Amazon, SpaceX clash at FCC, Musk congratulates Bezos on New Glenn rocket launch
content: Blue Origin successfully launched its New Glenn rocket, showcasing reusable booster technology with a vertical landing.  This achievement, acknowledged by Elon Musk, comes amidst ongoing regulatory disputes between Amazon and SpaceX concerning satellite proposals.  Both companies are vying for FCC approval for large satellite constellations, highlighting a competitive landscape in space infrastructure.

title: Making of India’s 95th GM: Aronyak Ghosh, from chasing tournament fees to parents’ relief
content: Aronyak Ghosh achieved his long-awaited Grandmaster title after a remarkable performance at the 23rd BCC Open 2026 in Bangkok. The 22-year-old's journey, marked by his father's dedication and the family's financial sacrifices, culminated in securing his third GM norm. This achievement signifies the success of years of commitment to the game, with chess now being Aronyak's primary focus.

title: Manipur board HSE class 12 result 2026 released: Check direct link to download
content: The Council of Higher Secondary Education, Manipur (COHSEM) has announced the Manipur Board Higher Secondary Examination (HSE) Class 12 result 2026 on April 20, 2026. Students can now check their provisional marksheets online using their roll number and date of birth. The exams for Arts, Science, and Commerce streams were conducted from February 17 to March 20, 2026.

title: 'Not a routine action': Cong says TN chief 'confined' under pretext of IT 'search' ahead of rally
content: Congress alleges the Income Tax department "unlawfully confined" Tamil Nadu chief K Selvaperunthagai, calling it a "blatant misuse" of agencies by the BJP to obstruct opposition campaigning ahead of Rahul Gandhi's visit. The party claims this is intimidation, not routine action, aimed at silencing dissent during a crucial election period.

title: Iran war impact: China’s dependence on US ethane deepens; set to import record volume
content: Ethane, a natural gas liquid, is mainly used to produce ethylene, a core input for plastics. China relies almost entirely on the United States for these supplies.

title: In West Bengal, the real battle is between SIR & anti-incumbency
content: As Mamata Banerjee seeks a fourth straight term, SIR — which has deleted or put under adjudication one in 10 of the state’s voters — has eclipsed incumbency, recasting Bengal’s election as a struggle over identity and exclusion

title: 15 dead, several injured as bus falls into gorge in J&K’s Udhampur
content: A devastating bus accident in Udhampur, Jammu and Kashmir, claimed at least 16 lives and left several injured as the vehicle plunged into a gorge. Rescue operations are underway, with authorities confirming heavy casualties are anticipated. Efforts are being made to provide medical aid and airlift critically wounded passengers.

title: IPL: Will Rohit Sharma play vs GT today? MI coach drops big fitness update
content: Mumbai Indians received a positive update on Rohit Sharma's fitness ahead of their IPL 2026 clash against Gujarat Titans on Monday. Coach Paras Mhambrey confirmed Rohit is fit and batting in the nets, though a final decision on his participation is pending. His return could be crucial for MI's struggling campaign.

title: ED raids premises of Karnataka Cong MLA’s sons, others in money laundering case
content: Enforcement Directorate officials conducted raids across Bengaluru on Monday, targeting premises linked to the sons of Karnataka Congress MLA N A Harris, Mohammed Haris Nalapad and Omar Farook Nalapad. The searches are part of a money laundering investigation connected to a 2017 cryptocurrency case involving alleged bitcoin theft by hacker Srikrishna Ramesh alias Sriki.

title: Angry over 'no invite', politician damages cricket pitch with tractor — Watch
content: A local politician, reportedly upset over not being invited to a cricket tournament's final, drove a tractor onto the pitch in Dharangaon, India, and vandalized it. The shocking incident, captured on video, rendered the field unplayable, forcing the match to be called off. While police intervened, organisers opted not to file a formal complaint.

title: Yuan for oil payments? UAE seeks US safety net amid Iran war - report
content: The UAE has requested a US financial safety net amid concerns that an Iran war could severely damage its economy and investor confidence. Talks included a currency-swap line proposal, as the UAE fears needing to use other currencies for transactions if dollar shortages arise.

title: India's 150kmph bowling hope still lives in village without roads - Inside Ashok's dream
content: Ashok Sharma is being touted as the next big thing from India's fast bowling stable. But in his village, Rampura, on the Delhi-Mumbai Expressway, around 35 km from Rajasthan's capital Jaipur, his family speaks about his biggest dream -- the blue jersey. Ashok Sharma has picked up six wickets in five matches this season so far for Gujarat Titans.

title: Lauren Kyle marks milestone as Connor McDavid gears up for playoffs
content: Connor McDavid capped the regular season with four assists, clinching his sixth Art Ross Trophy as the Oilers secured home-ice advantage. His growing chemistry with linemates and a strong team performance signal readiness for the playoffs. Off the ice, Lauren Kyle’s proud reaction added a personal layer. With momentum and structure in place, Edmonton enters its first-round series against Anaheim with real expectations.

title: Gold price prediction today: Will gold prices rise this week? Key levels to watch out for
content: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices are expected to continue being volatile in the coming days on uncertainty related to the US-Iran war and inflation data this week, says Manav Modi, Senior Analyst, Commodity Research at Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd.

title: 'Bengal will remember': TMC jabs PM Modi over 'jhalmuri break', claims Jharkhand CM had to return
content: Trinamool Congress criticized Prime Minister Narendra Modi for his jhalmuri break in Jhargram, alleging it caused Jharkhand CM Hemant Soren to be denied chopper landing and return without campaigning for Mamata Banerjee. The party accused Modi of displaying an anti-Adivasi mindset and humiliating elected leaders, claiming his actions prioritized photo opportunities over democratic rights.

title: KL Rahul's long-standing record shattered! Priyansh Arya creates history
content: Priyansh Arya smashed a blistering 93 off 37 balls against Lucknow Super Giants. His innings powered Punjab Kings to a massive 254/7. Punjab Kings successfully defended the total, restricting LSG to 200/5. Arya's performance earned him Player of the Match. This win keeps Punjab Kings at the top of the table.

title: 'I have killed my children': Haunting call made by UP man after slitting throats of two daughters
content: A father in Kanpur allegedly strangled and slit the throats of his 11-year-old twin daughters after sedating them. The pharmaceutical businessman was arrested after reporting the crime himself. Police suspect mental stress, depression, and financial problems as motives for the horrific act.

title: ‘Rs 37 lakh cash, gold, silver seized’: CBI arrests DGCA deputy director general in bribery case
content: The CBI has arrested a senior DGCA official and a private company representative for allegedly accepting a bribe of Rs 2.5 lakhs. The official, a deputy director general, was accused of demanding undue advantage for issuing approvals. Searches at four locations led to the seizure of Rs 37 lakhs in cash, gold, silver coins, and digital devices.

title: 'Blockade main obstacle': Iran rejects second round of talks with US in Pakistan
content: Iran has rejected further peace talks with the United States, citing excessive demands, shifting positions, and ongoing naval confrontations. Tehran blames Washington's "coercive measures," including a naval blockade and recent maritime incidents, for the breakdown in diplomacy and a negative atmosphere for negotiations.

title: Watch: Moment US Navy intercepts Iranian cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz
content: The US Navy intercepted and boarded an Iranian-flagged cargo vessel, the TOUSKA, in the Gulf of Oman after it ignored warnings and attempted to bypass a blockade. The USS Spruance disabled the ship's propulsion, and US Marines took custody. In retaliation, Iran launched drones towards US warships.

title: 'Mai match chheen sakta hoon': Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's bold warning
content: Young batting sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is continuing his fiery form in IPL 2026, becoming Rajasthan Royals' highest run-getter with 246 runs in 6 matches at a strike rate of 236.54. The 15-year-old aims to contribute to the senior Indian team after fulfilling his father's dream of playing in the World Cup.

title: ‘Attacked with beer bottles': 17-year-old killed by uncle over ‘affair’ with wife
content: A shocking incident unfolded near Pamurayi village where a 17-year-old student was brutally murdered by his uncle. Driven by suspicion of an illicit affair with his wife, the uncle allegedly lured the boy to an isolated factory. Following a heated argument, the enraged uncle attacked the teenager with beer bottles and cement bricks, leading to his death.

title: Stock market today: Nifty50 opens below 24,300; Sensex down over 200 points
content: Stock market today: Sensex and Nifty opened in red on Monday on weak global cues as the closure of Strait of Hormuz led to an increase in oil prices. However the market quickly revered losses to move in green territory.

title: Nagpur NGO chief accused of sex abuse, religious coercion of several young women
content: An NGO president in Nagpur was arrested for allegedly sexually abusing young women, religious coercion, defamation, and cyberstalking. The FIR details multiple incidents of harassment, including unwanted advances and monitoring staff. Intelligence agencies are now investigating the NGO's background and finances.

title: Muzarabani PSL ban: PCB admits ‘no contract’ but stands firm on punishment
content: The Pakistan Cricket Board acknowledged no formal contract was sent to Blessing Muzarabani for the PSL but defended his two-year ban, citing a verbal agreement. Muzarabani's agent refuted this, stating a contract is needed for an NOC, and called the ban excessive. The dispute arose after Muzarabani opted for the IPL over the PSL.

title: Top stocks to buy: Stock recommendations for April 20 week - check list
content: ​Stock market recommendations: Bharat Electronics, and MTAR Technologies are the top stock recommendations by Motilal Oswal Wealth Management Research Desk for this trading week starting April 20, 2026. The brokerage shares the target prices and rationale.

title: Why Trump Was Kept Out Of Control Room During F-15 Airmen Rescue In Iran
content: During this stressful time, "aides kept the president out of the room as they got minute-by-minute updates because they believed his impatience wouldn't be helpful, instead updating him at meaningful moments."

title: 4 Hours Of Mid-Air Horror: Flyers Seen Praying, Crying On Fly91 Flight
content: A flight lost control due to a sudden technical fault, leaving passengers in panic for nearly four hours mid-air.

title: BMW, Fortuner Parking Dispute Between Neighbours Leads To Murder In Delhi
content: The victim, identified as Pankaj Nayyar (34), had come from Noida to meet his brother Paras Nayyar (43) in Preet Vihar.

title: Heavy Rain Triggers Severe Waterlogging In Guwahati, Schools Shut, Traffic Hit
content: Commuters faced significant difficulties as key roads got submerged under knee-deep water, leaving vehicles stranded and leading to major traffic congestion.

title: Singapore's Growth Model Faces Test Amid Global Trade Challenges
content: Despite the existing challenges, Singapore is projected to outpace many developed peers as economies grapple with fallout from the Iran war.

title: Era Of Festival Purchase Over? Gold Sees Tepid Demand On Akshaya Tritiya
content: According to bullion dealers, gold purchases are no longer clustered around festivals. Instead, price-sensitive buyers now wait for price drops.

title: Video: US Navy Boards Iran-Flagged Ship In 1st Seizure Amid Hormuz Blockade
